one_line_thesis: Post-Corebridge AIG compounds adjusted book through General Insurance underwriting, float spread, and repurchases; at ~$80 the base case implies ~11.5% per year with partial dhando from catastrophe and casualty tail risk.

deep_dive.executive_summary: Post-Corebridge AIG earns $7.09 per share of adjusted after-tax income on a $78 adjusted book base. At $79.80, Marvin expects 11.5% per year. Stance watch; filings-only base case.

pricing_analysis.conclusion: Hurdle prices are derived from the decision-grade universal contract; they do not constitute a capital decision.

decision.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

optionality.rule: Every option requires a beneficiary, probability, timing, remaining capital, failure case, and non-overlap control; absence of option value must be explicit rather than unvalued.

committee.next_action: Freeze the evidence packet and select three method-independent raters.

method_fit.label: High-return compounder
applicability_tests: Owner earnings can be separated from stock compensation, working capital, and maintenance capital.
Incremental returns on retained capital are observable and durable.
The competitive advantage explains pricing, retention, share, or cost outcomes.
Terminal value is supported by a reinvestment runway rather than an unexplained multiple.
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism

validation_cohort.purpose: Test depletion, commodity exposure, finite reserves, and royalty-unit reconciliation.
Test tangible capital, credit losses, funding, regulation, and excess-capital realization.
Test owner earnings, capital-light reinvestment, cyclicality, and buyback value creation.
Test normalized margins, industry supply response, replacement cost, and reinvestment timing.
Test product concentration, pipeline probabilities, patent cliffs, and catalyst timing.

method_fit.rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

outcomes.weighting_rule: Do not change a persona's relevance within a power zone until at least 20 attributable, dividend-aware outcomes exist there; never reweight automatically.

attribution.explanation: The current component schedule is the first decision-grade baseline; attribution begins with the next dated valuation snapshot.

component_valuation.decision_rule: Use the complete low/base/high component schedule. Embedded components are estimated but not added twice.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of AIG, including North America Commercial, International Commercial, and Global Personal underwriting engines, Corebridge stake and float surplus, and catastrophe/reserve stress reserve.

economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Operating segments valued through owner-cash discount paths on allocated adjusted after-tax income; Corebridge/float surplus and stress reserve are separate overlap keys.

timeline.label: Q1 2026 General Insurance adjusted pre-tax income continued strong; share count fell to roughly 538M outstanding
FY2025 adjusted after-tax income $4.0B; $2.3B underwriting income (+22% YoY); ~$3.9B repurchase authorization remaining
Completed Corebridge deconsolidation; AIG retained minority stake and dividend stream while refocusing on General Insurance
Corebridge Financial IPO completed; Life & Retirement separated from legacy AIG conglomerate structure
Peter Zaffino CEO era accelerated de-risking, Fortitude Re runoff, and capital return program
Fortitude Re reinsurance deal transferred legacy life reserves; AIG retained funds-withheld assets and runoff exposure
Global Financial Crisis forced government assistance; subsequent decade-long shrink-and-simplify turnaround
Spitzer-era investigations and restatements reshaped governance and risk controls

industry.structure: Global commercial property-casualty insurance is oligopolistic among rated carriers with broker-led distribution; AIG competes with Chubb, Zurich, and Lloyd's syndicates on complex multinational risks where scale and claims expertise matter.
industry.share_shift: AIG shed life/retirement via Corebridge and narrowed to General Insurance; commercial lines gained underwriting income in 2025 while personal lines remain near breakeven.
industry.trend: Property catastrophe frequency, casualty social inflation, and higher investment yields dominate the cycle; post-spin AIG emphasizes combined ratio discipline and share repurchases over empire building.

top_claims.claim: The long portfolio also has exposure to three insurance opportunities: American International Group (AIG), Ameriprise Financial and Arthur J Gallagher.
Enhanced Value Portfolio Additions  AIG $45.00 January 2021 Warrants (AIG-WT) – During 4Q15 we added a position in AIG warrants with an expiration date of January 2021.
